evals.prompt: We just have a cancel button that immediately cancels. No cancel flow, no save offers, nothing. How do we build this out?
evals.expected_output: Should design a complete cancel flow with: cancellation reason survey, dynamic save offers matched to each reason, and post-cancellation win-back setup. Should provide copy for at least 3 save offer variants. Should recommend setting up a dunning sequence as a separate workstream. Should prioritize implementation steps.
assertions: Provides dynamic save offers per reason
Provides copy for save offer variants
